Definition: No lie, for real, being completely honest
Example: That pizza was amazing, no cap

Definition: To do something exceptionally well, to kill it
Example: She slayed that presentation

Definition: Suspicious or sketchy, from Among Us game
Example: He's acting real sus right now

Definition: Really good, especially about food
Example: This mac and cheese is bussin

Definition: For real for real — emphasizing sincerity
Example: I'm tired of this job fr fr

Definition: Agreement or confirmation, like 'okay' or 'sounds good'
Example: Wanna grab food? Bet.

Definition: Mediocre, average, nothing special
Example: That movie was honestly mid

Definition: Bitter or upset about something, often petty
Example: She's so salty she didn't get invited

Definition: Overly bothered or upset about something
Example: Why are you so pressed about this?

Definition: An extremely enthusiastic fan, or to be one
Example: I stan Taylor Swift so hard

Definition: Period but with emphasis — end of discussion
Example: She's the best singer alive, periodt

Definition: Assessing someone's mood or energy
Example: Quick vibe check — are you okay?

Definition: It has the energy/vibe of something
Example: This outfit is giving main character energy

Definition: When something occupies your mind without effort
Example: That song is living in my head rent free

Definition: Did exactly what was needed, nailed it
Example: Her Met Gala look? She understood the assignment

Definition: Acting like the protagonist of a movie/show
Example: Today I'm giving main character energy

Definition: A sudden feeling of disgust toward someone you liked
Example: He gave me the ick when he licked his fingers

Definition: Someone who does too much for a person they like
Example: He bought her flowers every day, total simp

Definition: Suddenly cutting off all communication without explanation
Example: He ghosted me after three dates

Definition: Charm or ability to attract romantic partners
Example: He's got so much rizz it's unfair

Definition: Delusional, having unrealistic expectations
Example: She thinks she'll marry that celebrity, she's so delulu

Definition: Did something perfectly, killed it
Example: She ate that dance routine and left no crumbs

Definition: Did something so well there's nothing to criticize
Example: That performance? She left no crumbs

Definition: A threat to fight someone
Example: Talk about my mama again and catch these hands

Definition: Go outside, stop being chronically online
Example: You've been arguing on Twitter for 6 hours, touch grass

Definition: Spending way too much time on the internet
Example: Only someone chronically online would know that meme

Definition: Someone who seems to have no original thoughts, like a game character
Example: He just agrees with everyone, total NPC behavior

Definition: Somewhat, secretly, to a moderate degree
Example: I lowkey want to skip work today

Definition: Very much, openly, without hiding it
Example: I highkey love this song

Definition: Completely serious, not joking at all
Example: I'm deadass about to quit my job

Definition: Is uniquely good or impactful in a special way
Example: Music at 3am hits different

Definition: Making me laugh uncontrollably
Example: That video is absolutely sending me 💀

Definition: I'm dead / dying of laughter
Example: She really said that to his face 💀

Definition: When a reply gets more likes than the original post
Example: Ratio + L + didn't ask

Definition: Loss, failure, bad take
Example: That's a massive L for him

Definition: Win, success, good outcome
Example: Getting that promotion is a huge W

Definition: Euphemism used to avoid content moderation filters
Example: That horror movie tried to unalive the main character

Definition: The best at something, the ultimate example
Example: She's the CEO of awkward situations

Definition: Someone who seeks validation by putting others down
Example: She's such a pick-me girl, always trashing other women

Definition: Manipulate someone into questioning their reality
Example: Don't gaslight me, I saw the text messages

Definition: Keeping something exclusive, not sharing with others
Example: Stop gatekeeping that restaurant, tell me the name!

Definition: A woman who is ambitious and empowered (sometimes ironic)
Example: She gaslight gatekeep girlbossed her way to the top

Definition: Thriving and enjoying life fully
Example: Quit my job, traveling the world, living my best life

Definition: Outdated, trying too hard to be trendy
Example: Live laugh love signs are so cheugy

Definition: Successfully met expectations or did what was needed
Example: The DJ understood the assignment tonight

Definition: A phase of life or identity you're currently in
Example: I'm in my villain era

Definition: Something you think about way too often
Example: The Roman Empire for women is what men think about constantly

Definition: A trait that's not bad but oddly weird or boring
Example: His beige flag is that he narrates cooking like a show

Definition: When too much internet content deteriorates your thinking
Example: I have terminal brainrot from watching TikTok all day

Definition: Someone's energy or presence, often used in point systems
Example: He tripped in front of his crush, -1000 aura
